concept: Papa's Pizzeria To Go! is a time-management cooking game where players manage a pizzeria, taking customer orders and preparing pizzas through a multi-station process of spreading sauce, adding toppings, baking, and slicing. Gameplay is divided into distinct stations (Order, Topping, Bake, Cut), navigated via on-screen tabs, where players use drag-and-drop, tapping, and swiping gestures to accurately fulfill orders against a customer patience timer.
name: Papa's Pizzeria To Go!
